ai_insights.executive_summary: The NWMS network achieved a composite performance score of 72.6 out of 100 in February 2026 (where 50 represents the network average), associated with strong gains in operational efficiency across most clinics. Month-over-month improvements in treatments running past closing time—Federal Way declined 53.7% from 1.1 to 0.5 treatments per day, and Tacoma dropped 60.5% from 0.8 to 0.3—demonstrate meaningful progress in schedule adherence. However, one clinic requires targeted attention: Tacoma's average patient delay of 8.5 minutes sits 27% above the company average of 6.68 minutes, presenting the network's most significant performance gap.
highlights: Gig Harbour continues to lead the network with a composite score of 79 out of 100, supported by 100% iAssign utilization and an average delay of 5.5 minutes—well below the company average of 6.68 minutes. Federal Way demonstrated exceptional month-over-month progress, with minutes past close per patient improving 61.3% from 42.2 minutes in January to 16.3 minutes in February, while nurse utilization rose 15.0 percentage points from 58.0% to 66.7% in the same period. Olympia's chair utilization has improved consistently over four consecutive months to a three-month average of 74.5%, now running 1.6 standard deviations above the company average of 64.13%, indicating strong asset utilization discipline.
concerns: We noticed that Puyallup's iAssign utilization stands at 42.1%, running 1.9 standard deviations below the company average of 86.4%—a gap of 50.5 percentage points that aligns with elevated minutes past close per patient of 41.8 minutes (1.7 standard deviations above the company mean of 26.4). This pattern suggests that lower iAssign adoption may be associated with scheduling fragmentation and extended operational hours. Separately, Olympia's treatments running past closing time average 3.2 per day, which runs 1.9 standard deviations above the company average of 1.1—a substantial operational strain despite strong chair utilization of 80.0%.
recommendations: We recommend that Tacoma's scheduling leadership conduct a focused audit of appointment interval templates and nurse-to-chair assignment workflows to address the clinic's 27% delay gap above the company average. Given Tacoma's strong scheduler compliance of 93.8% alongside its elevated 8.5-minute average delay (versus the company average of 6.68 minutes), the root cause likely resides in appointment duration calibration or care pathway design rather than scheduling discipline; a structured review of these templates would help isolate whether adjustments to buffer time, procedure duration estimates, or nurse allocation could narrow this gap.

scheduler_compliance.label: Scheduler Compliance
scheduler_compliance.explanation: Percentage of appointments scheduled following iOptimize recommendations. Higher is better. Company average is typically 60-70%. OncoSmart benchmark target is 75%.

avg_delay_mins.label: Avg Delay
avg_delay_mins.explanation: Average daily schedule delay in minutes. Lower is better. Measures how far behind the clinic is running on average.

avg_treatments_per_day.label: Tx Past Close/Day
avg_treatments_per_day.explanation: Average treatments running past treatment close per day (overtime patients per day). Lower is better.

avg_treatment_mins_per_patient.label: Tx Mins Past Close/Patient
avg_treatment_mins_per_patient.explanation: Average treatment minutes past closing time per patient. Lower is better.

avg_chair_utilization.label: Chair Utilization
avg_chair_utilization.explanation: Average chair utilization rate. Higher is better.

iassign_utilization.label: iAssign Utilization
iassign_utilization.explanation: Percentage of nurse assignments completed via iAssign. Higher means more consistent, optimized assignments.

avg_patients_per_nurse.label: Patients/Nurse/Day
avg_patients_per_nurse.explanation: Average patients per nurse per day. Context-dependent -- too high means understaffing, too low means inefficiency.

avg_chairs_per_nurse.label: Chairs/Nurse
avg_chairs_per_nurse.explanation: Average chairs assigned per nurse. Context-dependent.

avg_nurse_to_patient_chair_time.label: Nurse Utilization
avg_nurse_to_patient_chair_time.explanation: Average nurse-to-patient in-chair time per day. Higher is better.

chatbot_context.data_notes: Company Avg rows represent the network average across all locations for this client in the given month. Onco rows are global oncology benchmarks from the OncoSmart network. Rows named Global Avg, Network Avg, Total, or Overall are network-wide aggregates, not individual clinic locations. MoM (Month-over-Month) deltas compare the current month to the prior month. Composite scores are weighted 0 to 100 where 100 is best-in-class performance.
